title: Noelling Totem
description: replaces the default totem model and the sound to noelle from deltarune
body:
this resource pack changes the default texture of the totem to noelling and changes the default totem sound to the noelle scream "snd_noelle_scared" sound from deltarune

check "Versions" tab for Noelle version

![totem showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fd44bc7312b689cfcb0aaefbbf81e36463f684d.png)

[the "snd_noelle_scared" sound](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1F4Tq8G3-oIPlQvVtJr-PZWim2nR6121_/view)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



(this is my first resource pack so it might look bad)
